title.en: How Java Makes Dynamically Updated Configuration Center Values Take Effect Under @Value: Source Analysis Based on Spring Events
title.zh: Java 如何让配置中心动态更新的值在 `@Value` 注解下动态生效：基于 Spring 事件机制的源码分析

summary.en: A source-level analysis of how Spring applications can make configuration center changes dynamically update existing @Value fields through PropertySource replacement, ApplicationEvent publishing, BeanPostProcessor scanning, expression resolution, TypeConverter conversion, and reflective field or setter write-back, with a comparison against @RefreshScope and engineering boundary guidance.
summary.zh: 从源码层面分析 Spring 应用如何通过替换 PropertySource、发布 ApplicationEvent、BeanPostProcessor 扫描、表达式解析、TypeConverter 类型转换和反射字段或 setter 回写，让配置中心变更动态更新已有 Bean 的 @Value 字段，并比较 @RefreshScope 与事件回写方案的边界。

readingDirection.en: Read this when implementing dynamic configuration refresh for Spring @Value fields, designing a configuration center integration, comparing @RefreshScope with event-driven field write-back, or evaluating the consistency and lifecycle boundaries of runtime configuration changes.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在实现 Spring @Value 字段动态配置刷新、设计配置中心接入、比较 @RefreshScope 与事件驱动字段回写，或评估运行期配置变更的一致性与生命周期边界时阅读。
